flow_points: South Africa scored 48 runs for 2 wickets in their Powerplay.
South Africa achieved a high-scoring finish in the Death Overs, posting a 12.2 run rate.
This late surge by South Africa created a shift in match momentum.
New Zealand began their chase strongly, scoring 84 runs for 0 wickets in their Powerplay.
New Zealand's Powerplay run rate was an aggressive 14.0.
FH Allen anchored New Zealand's innings with a rapid 100 runs off 33 balls.
Allen's century contributed 57.8% of New Zealand's total runs.
FH Allen's dominant performance was a key turning point, anchoring New Zealand's victory.
R Ravindra sustained defensive pressure, contributing with an impact score of 87.48.
New Zealand ultimately secured a convincing 9-wicket victory.
